Class WebViewShellExperienceOptions

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora.Shell
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Options for WebViewShellExperience. All features are opt-in.

public sealed class WebViewShellExperienceOptions
